title: aspidium aculeatum var. proliferum
intro: Aspidium aculeatum var. proliferum, commonly known as the proliferation fern or proliferous shield fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as skin irritations, burns, and eczema. The health benefits of Aspidium aculeatum var. proliferum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to soothe skin conditions, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
